scripts.deploy:dev: bash scripts/build_lambda.sh && ROBOTRADE_ENV=dev ampx sandbox --profile robotrade-admin --outputs-out-dir web --once && cp web/amplify_outputs.json web/amplify_outputs.dev.json
scripts.deploy:prod: bash scripts/build_lambda.sh && ROBOTRADE_ENV=prod ampx sandbox --identifier prod --profile robotrade-admin --outputs-out-dir web --once && cp web/amplify_outputs.json web/amplify_outputs.prod.json && cp web/amplify_outputs.dev.json web/amplify_outputs.json
